span.p: Apps - one domain crate each, written per app

span.p:
The shared base - poured once
shared · user · mailing · ai
auth, sessions, RBAC, config, DB pool, email, OpenAPI

div.style: color: rgb(91, 44, 196) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Apps depend on the base, never the reverse.
Domain crates meet only through shared traits.
The compiler refuses to build a crossed edge.
